title: Lego Skeleton Death
description: When any kind of Skeleton dies, it sounds like it broke apart into Legos.
body:
This pack does one thing, and it does it well. The sound of when a Skeleton (or Wither Skeleton, Stray, or Bogged) dies is replaced with the sound of legos breaking apart in a Lego game. Pair this with the Physics Mod and it's literally perfect.
